subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! This is a servant who hath linked himself unto Thy unique and peerless One, the All-Praised, Who attained unto the Day of the dawning of Thy Light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا عبد انتسب الی وحیدک الفرید الحمید الذی ادرک یوم اشراق نورک و
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
